item.title: Smash your Adapter Monolith with the Connect pattern
item.description: TL;DR “Breaking down monolithic remote API Clients into individual Actions sharing a common single-function Protocol interface allows them to not only be more decoupled at the code layer, but also simplifies both testing and extensibility.
Nothing here! Did you take a wrong turn? Don’t worry, it happens to the best of us. Let’s get you back on track.

item.title: Albert Latacz
item.description: An enthusiastic and open minded all-round agile leader with over 15 years of experience in building software systems that work. As a passionate leader I always aim to help teams to deliver great quality software with emphasis on lean approach, pragmatic programming principles and value delivery without compromising on quality.

item.title: Behraam Wahid
item.description: Technical Program Manager with 10+ years in the fintech and retail space. I help growth stage to large companies such as Mettle, OLX and Argos deliver key projects.

item.title: David Denton
item.description: Versatile, hands-on Engineering Lead, specialising in architecting Continually Delivered platforms (<15 min lead time) using heavy automation & shift-left methods, driving high team throughput and reductions in time-to-market.

item.title: Disclaimer
item.description: Last updated: 2024-05-20 WEBSITE DISCLAIMER The information provided by Clockwork Group (“Company”, “we”, “our”, “us”) on clockwork.ing (the “Site”) is for general informational purposes only.

item.title: Franck Rasolo
item.description: I am a hands-on software architect, engineer, mentor with well over two decades of delivering reliable, repeatable, observable infrastructure and software systems to end users like clockwork using engineering discipline, eXtreme Programming practices and much software automation.

item.title: Giovanni Asproni
item.description: Experienced professional with a track record of aligning technology strategy with business goals. Expert at leading and managing cross-functional teams. Well versed in designing and implementing complex software systems.

item.title: How air up achieved $1.2M in time-to-market savings by leveraging total automation
James Richardson
item.description: Specialties: Agile Software Development Practices Development Team Lead & Management Exotic Equity Derivatives Retail Banking UK Payments Telecommunications Embedded Consumer Devices Digital Broadcast Scientific Publishing.

item.title: Julie Camosseto
item.description: I help companies of all sizes make their processes more efficient, and accelerate delivery of assured technological innovation. I accomplish this by blending various management methodologies, to achieve an adaptable model that meets the organisation’s needs.

item.title: Privacy policy
item.description: Effective date: 2024-05-20 1. Introduction Welcome to Clockwork Group. Clockwork Group (“us”, “we”, or “our”) operates clockwork.ing (hereinafter referred to as “Service”).

item.title: Terms & conditions
